tender.description: Cleaning and sweeping of roads, footpaths, berms, CC path, parking, brick pavements, path, bell mouths, kerb channel, etc. including removal of unclaimed dumped malba, wild/unwanted bushes, grass, dead animals etc. and disposal of the same to the nea
